full_text:
Cheng Zheng
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cheng Zheng. In 203, persuaded Zhang to divide Jianwei and set up a new commandry. Cheng Zheng was affiliated with Liu Zhang.
